honest_note: The repo now has a repo-owned selfhost dogfood path for atlas/manifold plus chart contains/project/embed/local, `line.transition(...)`, and `a j b` surfaces through cppfront bootstrap, but alpha remains outside the verified selfhost corpus and the only host-resolved `using kilo` route here (`codex exec -m kilo ...`) still panics in `system-configuration` before touching repo files.
